prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large cyan rubber sphere
  - obj_1: large green rubber cube
  - obj_2: small brown metal cube
  - obj_3: small green rubber sphere
  - obj_4: large purple metal cube
  - obj_5: large yellow rubber cube
  - obj_6: large purple metal cylinder
  - obj_7: large blue rubber sphere
  - obj_8: large red rubber cylinder
  - obj_9: small cyan metal cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0061] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0062] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0065] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0067] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0069] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0070] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0071] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0072] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0073] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0074] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0075] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0076] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0077] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0078] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0079] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0080] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_3 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D scenes to determine distances between objects.

Looking at the images, I need to identify the objects and their positions:
- obj_0: large cyan rubber sphere
- obj_1: large green rubber cube
- obj_2: small brown metal cube
- obj_3: small green rubber sphere
- obj_4: large purple metal cube
- obj_5: large yellow rubber cube
- obj_6: large purple metal cylinder
- obj_7: large blue rubber sphere
- obj_8: large red rubber cylinder
- obj_9: small cyan metal cylinder

From the images, I can estimate 3D positions:
- obj_0 (cyan sphere): left/front area
- obj_1 (green cube): middle area
- obj_2 (brown cube): front-right area
- obj_3 (green sphere): front-center area
- obj_4 (purple cube): right area
- obj_5 (yellow cube): far right
- obj_6 (purple cylinder): left/behind area
- obj_7 (blue sphere): right-center area
- obj_8 (red cylinder): left-front area
- obj_9 (cyan cylinder): front area

Distance obj_0 to obj_3: cyan sphere to green sphere - moderate distance (~2 units)

Now comparing each pair:
- obj_2 to obj_4: brown cube to purple cube - close (~1 unit)
- obj_2 to obj_5: brown cube to yellow cube - moderate
- obj_2 to obj_6: brown cube to purple cylinder - large distance
- obj_2 to obj_7: brown cube to blue sphere - moderate
- obj_2 to obj_8: brown cube to red cylinder - moderate
- obj_2 to obj_9: brown cube to cyan cylinder - large
- obj_4 to obj_5: purple cube to yellow cube - close
- obj_4 to obj_6: purple cube to purple cylinder - large
- obj_4 to obj_7: purple cube to blue sphere - moderate
- obj_4 to obj_8: purple cube to red cylinder - moderate
- obj_4 to obj_9: purple cube to cyan cylinder - large
- obj_5 to obj_6: yellow cube to purple cylinder - large
- obj_5 to obj_7: yellow cube to blue sphere - moderate
- obj_5 to obj_8: yellow cube to red cylinder - large
- obj_5 to obj_9: yellow cube to cyan cylinder - large
- obj_6 to obj_7: purple cylinder to blue sphere - moderate
- obj_6 to obj_8: purple cylinder to red cylinder - moderate
- obj_6 to obj_9: purple cylinder to cyan cylinder - moderate
- obj_7 to obj_8: blue sphere to red cylinder - moderate
- obj_7 to obj_9: blue sphere to cyan cylinder - moderate
